heading: NORTH AMERICAN DEVELOPMENT BANK AND RELATED PROVISIONS
label: XXVIII NORTH AMERICAN DEVELOPMENT BANK AND RELATED PROVISIONS
notes: CodificationThis subchapter consists of part 2 of subtitle D of title V of the North American Free Trade Agreement Implementation Act, . Section 601 of the United States-Mexico-Canada Agreement Implementation Act, , repealed , effective on the date the USMCA entered into force (). However, provided that does not apply to part 2 of subtitle D of title V of and revived the provisions of such part 2 as if had not been enacted.Pub. L. 103–182Pub. L. 116–113Pub.
